name: OpenAI Team
description: High-signal OpenAI launches verified against official OpenAI announcements and Help Center release notes.
headline: Verified OpenAI launches across {days} days.
subtitle: January 7 — March 23, 2026. Company-level launches from official OpenAI sources.
footnote: Cross-checked on March 31, 2026 against OpenAI announcement pages and OpenAI Help Center release notes.

releases.title: ChatGPT Health
releases.description: OpenAI introduced a dedicated Health space in ChatGPT with separate memory, files, and connected health data.

releases.title: Codex app for macOS
releases.description: OpenAI launched the Codex desktop app as a command center for supervising multiple long-running agents.

releases.title: GPT-5.3-Codex
releases.description: OpenAI released GPT-5.3-Codex as its most capable agentic coding model, combining coding, reasoning, and computer-use strength.

releases.title: GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark
releases.description: OpenAI released Codex-Spark as an ultra-fast research preview for real-time coding inside Codex.

releases.title: Projects can add sources from apps and chats
releases.description: ChatGPT Projects gained app links, saved chat outputs, and ad-hoc text as reusable project sources.

releases.title: GPT-5.4
releases.description: OpenAI rolled out GPT-5.4 across ChatGPT, Codex, and the API as its new mainline reasoning model.

releases.title: GPT-5.4 mini and nano
releases.description: OpenAI launched faster, cheaper GPT-5.4 mini and nano variants optimized for coding, subagents, and high-volume workloads.

releases.title: File Library in ChatGPT
releases.description: ChatGPT began saving uploaded and generated files into a reusable library that can be referenced across chats.
